description_long: This object is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, angular design and a dark gray exterior. It features a twin-engine configuration with large exhaust nozzles at the rear and sharply swept-back wings, giving it a high-speed aerodynamic profile. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is covered by a tinted, bubble-shaped canopy, suggesting a multi-seat arrangement. The tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers, forming a distinctive H-tail configuration. The landing gear is not visible, indicating it is likely retractable and integrated into the fuselage and wings. The overall appearance is robust and streamlined, suitable for high-performance flight in urban or open environments.
description: A dark gray, twin-engine military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward, bubble-canopy cockpit. The design is sleek and aerodynamic, with a robust, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin engine exhausts, swept-back wings, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit canopy, and angular wing design.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and symmetrical wing and tail arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the jet's profile and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, inferred from typical design).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely multi-seat.
